description: Rolled at end of 4th term and every term thereafter. Roll 2D, applying the total number of terms as a negative DM.
dm_rule: Subtract number of terms served from the roll

-6_or_less.title: Severe aging
-6_or_less.text: Reduce three physical characteristics by 2, reduce one mental characteristic by 1.

-4.title: Significant aging
-4.text: Reduce two physical characteristics by 2, reduce one physical characteristic by 1.

-3.title: Moderate aging
-3.text: Reduce one physical characteristic by 2, reduce two physical characteristics by 1.

1_or_more.title: No effect
1_or_more.text: You shrug off the ravages of time... for now.

aging_crisis.description: If any characteristic is reduced to 0, the Traveller suffers an aging crisis. They die unless they pay 1D × Cr10,000 for medical care, which will bring any characteristics back up to 1. They automatically fail any Qualification rolls from now on.
